data.title: As a sprint orchestrator, I want sprint SKILL.md to handle UNCERTAIN completion-verifier verdicts with opus re-dispatch before blocking stories
data.description:
As a sprint orchestrator, I need sprint SKILL.md to route UNCERTAIN completion-verifier verdicts to an opus re-dispatch loop so that story closure confidence is maximized before stories are blocked.

DONE DEFINITIONS:
- sprint SKILL.md Step 10a: UNCERTAIN branch — re-dispatch completion-verifier with model: opus; opus PASS → proceed; opus UNCERTAIN → tag story:blocked + ticket comment "Completion verifier UNCERTAIN: <verifier summary>"; story NOT closed
- sprint SKILL.md Phase 6 Step 0.75: same UNCERTAIN branch for epic closure
- "blocked flag": ticket tag story:blocked + ticket comment with verifier uncertainty summary
- HARD-GATE text updated: "Only overall_verdict: PASS or UNCERTAIN (routed to opus), or technical failure permits proceeding"
- Existing PASS/FAIL routing tests updated to include UNCERTAIN branch behavior
- Opus re-dispatch bounded to one retry; prevents infinite UNCERTAIN loops
- Task descriptions explicitly name sprint SKILL.md as target (rule 18)

CONSIDERATIONS:
- [Safeguard] sprint SKILL.md in plugins/dso/skills/sprint/ — safeguard file (rule 18)
- [Sequence] Depends on M — M defines UNCERTAIN in completion-verifier.md first
- [Scope] One retry only: sonnet UNCERTAIN → opus; opus UNCERTAIN → blocked (no further retries)
